title: expand_vars Cow return unused at all sites
description: expand_vars returns Cow<'a, str> to allow returning a borrowed slice when no substitution is needed, but every call site immediately calls .into_owned() (evaluator.rs lines 131, 136, 163, 532-533, 557-558, 583-584, 607). The Cow::Borrowed fast path is thus never exploited: when variables_enabled is false the function returns Cow::Borrowed(s) but callers still clone via .into_owned(). Idiomatic Rust would either (a) return String directly since all callers allocate unconditionally, or (b) rewrite call sites to use the Cow without .into_owned() where the value is only read. As written, the Cow type adds complexity with no payoff.
